metadata.title: Pelargos IVF - Assisted Fertility Care Abroa
metadata.metaDescription: Pelargos IVF offers personalized fertility care in Greece with success rates up to 85%. Specializing in IVF, egg donation, surrogacy, PCOS & endometriosis treatment. Led by Dr. Harry Karpouzis with state-of-the-art facilities in Athens. Book your consultation today.
metadata.openGraphTitle: Pelargos IVF - Assisted Fertility Care Abroa
metadata.openGraphDescription: Discover personalized IVF and fertility treatments at Pelargos IVF. Led by Dr. Harry Karpouzis, our clinic specializes in PCOS, endometriosis, egg donation, and surrogacy with success rates of up to 85%. Experience innovative protocols and holistic care in state-of-the-art facilities in Greece.

Pelargos IVF offers egg donation packages, with guarantees and top success rates. FIND OUT MORE Surrogacy Service Pelargos IVF offers surrogacy services at collaborative IVF centres in Greece. Carried out by the Pelargos IVF team, surrogacy treatment in Greece has many advantages. FIND OUT MORE Virtual Consultation Pelargos IVF offers an online Consultation service to facilitate medical consultations with clients who are overseas. FIND OUT MORE Pelargos means “stork” in Greek. In Greece as in so many different cultures around the world, the stork is the foremost symbol of the arrival of a newborn. Storks are often portrayed carrying a little cloth bundle in their beaks just before delivering a baby to its new home. OUR PHILOSOPHY We work with the best IVF centres in Greece Dr Karpouzis personally overseas every case – from the initial consultation to the positive pregnancy test result. He creates bespoke and innovative protocols for his patients, down to the last detail. Mr Karpouzis has extensive experience in the field of assisted conception, both in the UK and Greece. We work with the best fertility centres and private maternity hospitals in Greece. These institutions use cutting-edge technologies and work in state-of-the-art embryology laboratories. Our collaborating maternity hospitals and Day Surgery Units use the latest technology, facilities and equipment. Find out more Concierge We are pleased to announce that our clients who come from abroad can now access free membership of the Luxury Concierge Service, called Elixir. This way every patient from abroad can have a personal medical tourism concierge. The service includes organisation of all matters prior to the arrival in Greece and during their stay. On top of that, Elixir members will be prioritised and enjoy complimentary services and discounts for accommodation, hotels, shops, restaurants and transportation. Elixir Concierge Members Club will be at your service from the moment of your initial enquiry all the way till you board your return flight home from Greece, after your successful treatment. Find out more WHY US Holistic Approach to Care of Infertility Patients ALL-INCLUSIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUALISED FERTILITY SPECIALIST CARE ONLINE CONSULTATION/ FLY-IN SERVICE STATE-OF-THE-ART TECHNOLOGY EMBRYOLOGIC LABARATORY FIXED PRICES. OBS & GYN CONSULTANT. FERTILITY SPECIALIST FOR AN APPOINTMENT PRESS HERE KARIM MELEKA COMMERCIAL DIRECTOR VASILIKI LAPPA SENIOR FERTILITY MIDWIFE FOR A REFERRAL PRESS HERE SOPHIA MELETI SENIOR FERTILITY MIDWIFE FOR A REFERRAL PRESS HERE Elisavet Petraki SENIOR FERTILITY MIDWIFE FOR A REFERRAL PRESS HERE ELEFTHERIA PEIROUNAKI ENDOCRINOLOGIST/ DIABETES FOR A REFERRAL PRESS HERE PANOS ROUBESIS UROLOGIST FOR A REFERRAL PRESS HERE VASILIS CHATZIANTONIOU HEMATOLOGIST FOR A REFERRAL PRESS HERE KELLY KONTOU PSYCHOLOGIST FOR A REFERRAL PRESS HERE DUSA RADOSAVLJEVIC MIDWIFE & YOGA TEACHER FOR A REFERRAL PRESS HERE GEORGETTE YOUNG ACUPUNCTURIST FOR A REFERRAL PRESS HERE LEONIDAS AVGERINOS DENTIST / AESTHETIC DENTISTRY FOR A REFERRAL PRESS HERE DIMITRIOS BITSANIS DIETITIAN – NUTRITIONIST FOR A REFERRAL PRESS HERE Dhara Patel Director of Kuon Healthcare (UK) TESTIMONIALS I had an appointment with Dr Karpouzis for a fibroid that I had. They kept telling me that I needed an open surgery in order to have it removed. I had a laparoscopy with him. Next day I was at home and 10 days later I felt like I never had a surgery. All that, thanks to him.G.ZFor us, the best parts of our treatment with Dr Karpouzis was the genuine care for you and the fact that you’re treated as an individual. We never felt like we were just part of a system and always felt that we were given enough time.H. A(Athens)The IVF Centre where we did our cycle was so great. They stand by you throughout the process. You will never feel left out. Their consultation is crystal clear. I have a baby girl and I owe it to Dr Karpouzis and the staff of Institute of Life Fertility Centre.J. N(Rumania)I can never thank you enough for all you did for my husband and me - helping us to have our second baby boy. The whole team was so supportive and very professional throughout my treatment cycles.M.A(Athens)I cannot recommend Pelargos IVF enough. Dr Karpouzis made it an experience, I will never forget. My whole journey was just so perfect. It worries me to think where I would be if I had gone to one of the commercialised IVF clinics. I had such a personalized care throughout the procedure and a positive pregnancy test on my 1st egg donation cycle. I am so grateful.E. N (London) Always there to care. about.textContent: [email protected]0030 210 7779802 About Services Ivf/Fertility Egg Donation Egg Freezing OVARIAN PRP – OVARIAN REJUVENATION Surrogacy PGS (PGT-A)/PGD(PGT-M) Minimal Access Surgery Αesthetic Gynecology Pregnancy Our Team Our Locations Consultation Clinic I.V.F Centers Hospitals Contact Blog Legals Complaints Policy Privacy Policy Terms and conditions About Services Ivf/Fertility Egg Donation Egg Freezing OVARIAN PRP – OVARIAN REJUVENATION Surrogacy PGS (PGT-A)/PGD(PGT-M) Minimal Access Surgery Αesthetic Gynecology Pregnancy Our Team Our Locations Consultation Clinic I.V.F Centers Hospitals Contact Blog Legals Complaints Policy Privacy Policy Terms and conditions Welcome to Pelargos IVF Pelargos means “stork” in Greek. In Greece as in so many different cultures around the world, the stork is the foremost symbol of the arrival of a newborn. Storks are often portrayed carrying a little cloth bundle in their beaks just before delivering a baby to its new home The long-beaked bird has been long associated with babies in various mythologies and folklore stories around the world. Storks always return to the same nest 9 months after their migration to the south, which also played a role in linking these birds to the concepts of birth and family. In ancient Greece, the stork was revered alongside Hera, the goddess of marriage, motherhood, and fertility. Whereas in folklore storks are symbols of positive change and bearers of good news of new life, the reality of conception and birth for many people around the world strikes a deep chord. For many subfertile couples, a constant battle with their own selves is required to maintain happiness, determination, dedication and peace of mind, in order to finally achieve their family goal. It is not easy at all. Both financially and psychologically. This is where Pelargos IVF medical Team comes in. We are here to help you make the right decision, to stand by you 24/7 – from the beginning of this journey to the birth of your child and the fulfilment of your dream. We make sure that you don’t have any unnecessary expenses, while supporting you together with a group of medics and paramedics in different fields. Whether you stay in Greece or trust us with this journey while abroad, you will have a complete peace of mind. Our concierge services in Athens are there to arrange anything you need during your stay, leaving you the time and space to stay completely dedicated to your goal. We demonstrate the highest level of professionalism and always treat you with decency and respect. We value the human connection with our clients. We make your experience with us memorable because the journey itself matters as much as reaching your final destination. Pelargos IVF has been created to become your Greek stork – there to make your family dream come true. We work together to bring your precious baby at your doorstep, turning subfertility into a fairy tale with a happy end. Have a nice flight with us, to the best destination in the world – family. Harry Karpouzis MD MRCOG FREE ONLINE CONSULTATION SCHEDULING BOOK YOUR FREE FERTILITY CONSULTATION ABOUT US Pelargos IVF is a premier fertility center specializing in personalized assisted reproductive treatment for women and couples in Greece and abroad. As an award-winning medical group of fertility specialists and reproductive health experts, we provide comprehensive IVF services, egg donation programs, surrogacy solutions, and advanced gynecological care at Greece’s leading fertility centers and private maternity hospitals. Our fertility team specializes in managing complex reproductive cases including recurrent implantation failures, PCOS (polycystic ovary syndrome), advanced endometriosis (stage 3-4), male factor subfertility, and age-related fertility challenges. We combine evidence-based medicine with cutting-edge reproductive technology to deliver exceptional IVF success rates, while our compassionate approach ensures emotional support throughout your fertility journey. With state-of-the-art embryology laboratories, world-class medical facilities, and personalized treatment protocols, Pelargos IVF delivers top-quality fertility services comparable to the best European IVF clinics. Whether you choose online consultations or in-person care, our dedicated team manages every aspect of your treatment—from initial diagnosis through pregnancy monitoring and delivery at Athens’ premier private maternity hospital. Lead Consultant Dr Karpouzis is an acclaimed obstetrician and gynaecologist specializing in assisted reproduction. He has received his training in the UK and holds an MRCOG qualification and BFS (British Fertility Society) accreditation, with extensive experience in IVF and minimal access gynecological surgery. Dr Karpouzis personally oversees every case—from initial consultation to positive pregnancy confirmation—creating individualized treatment plans for optimal outcomes. Pelargos IVF is structured as a comprehensive multidisciplinary medical group combining fertility expertise with holistic wellness support. Our integrated team includes reproductive endocrinologists, embryologists, gynecological surgeons, fertility nurses, mental health specialists, nutritionists, and wellness practitioners—all coordinated to provide seamless, all-inclusive fertility care in Greece. This collaborative approach ensures your reproductive health receives attention from multiple specialized perspectives, dramatically improving treatment success rates and patient satisfaction. The Pelargos IVF clinical team comprises haematologists, endocrinologists, urologists, clinical psychologists, acupuncturists, personal trainers, yoga and shiatsu practitioners based in Athens, along with clinical dieticians in London. Our network extends to respected fertility specialists across the UK, Belgium, Switzerland, Qatar, and the UAE—enabling seamless international coordination of your care. We also provide access to dermatology and aesthetic dentistry services, legal consultation for egg donation and surrogacy cases, professional medical interpreters, comprehensive medical tourism concierge services, and medication delivery coordination. Selected blood test and ultrasound clinics throughout the UK and beyond allow overseas patients to complete preliminary investigations locally before traveling to Athens. Our partnered pharmacies ensure timely medication delivery directly to your home, reducing logistics burdens during your fertility treatment. Our medical and paramedical staff consists of academically renowned, Western-trained specialists with extensive international experience in reproductive medicine and gynecological care. We work together as an integrated team, offering flexible online or face-to-face fertility consultations and implementing innovative, evidence-based reproductive treatments to consistently achieve top success rates in IVF cycles, egg donation programs, and complex gynecological cases. Starting with your initial consultation and continuing through delivery and postpartum care, our holistic approach addresses not only your medical needs but also your emotional wellbeing, financial considerations, and practical logistics. Our patients and international visitors benefit from partnership with Elixir Concierge Members Club, a luxury medical tourism service that manages all aspects of your fertility journey in Athens—from airport transfers and accommodation to restaurant reservations and entertainment—while you focus entirely on your treatment and recovery. Our primary goal is to successfully resolve even the most challenging fertility cases, delivering superior clinical outcomes and ensuring complete patient satisfaction through compassionate, personalized, and scientifically-advanced reproductive medicine. Always there to care. Working Hours MONDAY 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM TUESDAY 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM WEDNESDAY 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM THURSDAY 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM FRIDAY 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM SATURDAY 9:00 AM – 15:00 PM SUNDAY CLOSED OUR TEAM HARRY KARPOUZIS SCIENTIFIC DIRECTOR OF PELARGOS IVF. OBS & GYN CONSULTANT. team.footerText: Welcome to Pelargos IVF In Greece and in so many different cultures around the world, the stork is a symbol of the arrival of a newborn. Storks are often portrayed carrying a little cloth bundle in their beaks just before delivering a baby to its new home. Blog Σπερμοδιάγραμμα: Σωστή Προετοιμασία και Ερμηνεία Αποτελεσμάτων 25 March, 2026 IVF After 40 in Greece: Realistic Pathways and What Actually Works 25 March, 2026 Εξετάσεις Γονιμότητας στην Ελλάδα: Πλήρης Οδηγός για τη Διάγνωση στη Pelargos IVF 10 March, 2026 Subscribe to our Newsletter Pelargos IVF © 2022 | Crafted by K&M CREATIVE
team.textContent: [email protected]0030 210 7779802 About Services Ivf/Fertility Egg Donation Egg Freezing OVARIAN PRP – OVARIAN REJUVENATION Surrogacy PGS (PGT-A)/PGD(PGT-M) Minimal Access Surgery Αesthetic Gynecology Pregnancy Our Team Our Locations Consultation Clinic I.V.F Centers Hospitals Contact Blog Legals Complaints Policy Privacy Policy Terms and conditions About Services Ivf/Fertility Egg Donation Egg Freezing OVARIAN PRP – OVARIAN REJUVENATION Surrogacy PGS (PGT-A)/PGD(PGT-M) Minimal Access Surgery Αesthetic Gynecology Pregnancy Our Team Our Locations Consultation Clinic I.V.F Centers Hospitals Contact Blog Legals Complaints Policy Privacy Policy Terms and conditions Our Team HARRY KARPOUZIS Scientific Director Pelargos IVF Obs & Gyn Consultant Fertility Specialist Mr Karpouzis was born in Athens, in 1978. He is an Obstetrics and Gynecoly Consultant, specialised in Reproductive medicine /infertility and minimal invasive surgery and has more than 9 years of full time experience in the fields, at Consultant Level. He was fully trained and supbspecialised in the U.K. He has worked at some of the busiest hospitals in London (Guy’s & St. Thomas NHS Trust, King’s College Hospital, Newham University Hospital, University College Hospital, Homerton University Hospital), as an SHO, Registrar, senior Registrar and Consultant. He became a member of the Royal College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists in 2011 (MRCOG). VIEW BIO Peirounaki Eleftheria Dr MED Vasilis Chatziantoniou Panos Roubesis Kelly Kontou Dusa Radosavljevic Georgette Young LEONIDAS AVGERINOS Vasiliki Lappa Sophia Meleti Elisavet Petraki Dimitrios Bitsanis Legal Team Our dedicated legal team, has long experience in overseeing surrogacy treatments. The legal team will take on the surrogacy court hearing, which needs to take place before the embryo transfer. You can book a Skype consultation or preferably a face-to-face consultation with the lawyers to discuss all legal details pertaining to your case. You will meet the legal team to sign the required documents before the surrogate’s embryo transfer. READ MORE London/Uk Team We cooperate with a private blood clinic in North London, where we can refer our patients for their initial STD, AMH and hormonal blood checks, sperm analysis or any other blood tests. Special prices are given to patients referred by us. Pelargos IVF works with a group of fertility specialists, obstetrics and gynaecology consultants and sonographers, based in different areas of London. Ultrasound monitoring for women who undergo egg donation cycles is available. You can have your endometrium preparation done in London, which can be convenient for patients based in the UK. You will only need to travel to Athens when the endometrium is ready for the embryo transfer. Oestrogen /LH and endometrium measurements are done in London, supervised by Pelargos IVF, allowing for proper coordination with the donor and timing of the embryo transfer. Both an NHS and a private GP is available in central London to prescribe – upon our referral – medication to our patients after their embryo transfer, as well as refer them to do blood tests. We work with pharmacies in London who will ensure the delivery of medication to your home. We can also recommend an immigration/surrogacy solicitor, based in North London for surrogacy cases. Brussels/Belgium Team Ms Georgia Tsina, is a renowned Obstetrics and gynaecology consultant, who operates a private clinic in Brussels. Ms Tsina’s clinic is the recommended practice and the point of contact for Pelargos IVF patients who live Brussels. Georgia is our recommended obstetrician for delivering babies in Belgium after successful IVF treatments in Greece. Rest Of The World We cooperate with well-known Obstetrics and Gynaecology Consultants and Fertility Specialists in: • Switzerland • Sweden • Malta • UAE • Qatar • Cyprus and we are constantly expanding our network. Always there to care. Book Appointment Get Your Quote or Call: 0044 20 79711341 Contact Us Welcome to Pelargos IVF In Greece and in so many different cultures around the world, the stork is a symbol of the arrival of a newborn. Storks are often portrayed carrying a little cloth bundle in their beaks just before delivering a baby to its new home. addresses: Welcome to Pelargos IVF In Greece and in so many different cultures around the world, the stork is a symbol of the arrival of a newborn. Storks are often portrayed carrying a little cloth bundle in their beaks just before delivering a baby to its new home. Blog Σπερμοδιάγραμμα: Σωστή Προετοιμασία και Ερμηνεία Αποτελεσμάτων 25 March, 2026 IVF After 40 in Greece: Realistic Pathways and What Actually Works 25 March, 2026 Εξετάσεις Γονιμότητας στην Ελλάδα: Πλήρης Οδηγός για τη Διάγνωση στη Pelargos IVF 10 March, 2026 Subscribe to our Newsletter Pelargos IVF © 2022 | Crafted by K&M CREATIVE

Bienvenue chez Pelargos IVF En Grèce et dans de nombreuses cultures à travers le monde, on peut voir la cigogne survoler les toits, portant dans son bec un petit paquet, avant d’atterrir sur le pas de la porte d’un couple heureux, qui déballe ensuite leur précieux petit bébé souriant. metadata.title: Pelargos IVF - Assisted Fertility Care Abroa
metadata.metaDescription: Pelargos IVF offers personalized fertility care in Greece with success rates up to 85%. Specializing in IVF, egg donation, surrogacy, PCOS & endometriosis treatment. Led by Dr. Harry Karpouzis with state-of-the-art facilities in Athens. Book your consultation today.
metadata.openGraphTitle: Pelargos IVF - Assisted Fertility Care Abroa
metadata.openGraphDescription: Discover personalized IVF and fertility treatments at Pelargos IVF. Led by Dr. Harry Karpouzis, our clinic specializes in PCOS, endometriosis, egg donation, and surrogacy with success rates of up to 85%. Experience innovative protocols and holistic care in state-of-the-art facilities in Greece.

contactCandidates.value: Welcome to Pelargos IVF In Greece and in so many different cultures around the world, the stork is a symbol of the arrival of a newborn. Storks are often portrayed carrying a little cloth bundle in their beaks just before delivering a baby to its new home.
